sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM p_personnel_photo_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$

SELECT ppt.*,ft.fileName,ft.fileallName FROM p_personnel_photo_t ppt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft ON ppt.fileid=ft.id WHERE ppt.validflag > 0 AND ft.validflag > 0 AND ppt.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY ppt.defaultflag desc,ppt.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_personnel_photo_t (personnelid,fileid,defaultflag, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$fileid$,$defaultflag$, $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_personnel_photo_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_personnel_photo_t SET defaultflag=$defaultflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT ft.fileName,ft.fileallName FROM p_personnel_photo_t ppt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft ON ppt.fileid=ft.id WHERE ppt.validflag > 0 AND ft.validflag > 0 AND ppt.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND ppt.defaultflag =1
